rationale: The only resume change was swapping real employer names (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective) for generic placeholders (Acme Software, Pinepoint Systems, Northwind Labs). Both evaluations land on the identical score (2/10) and fault the same core gaps: insufficient hands-on C++ experience, missing Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise, and no explicit SQL Server/Oracle experience. The wording differences (e.g., '7 months' vs 'almost a decade ago', mentioning RIDE Capital, '12+ years') are ordinary run-to-run reasoning noise and none of them key off the changed employer names. No penalty or concern attaches to the placeholder company names.
